articles.title: Marsch's 'Canadian heroes' de实时r defining win
articles.summary: 在加拿大队击败南非队赢得首场世界杯淘汰赛胜利并晋级16强后，主教练杰西·马什毫不犹豫地称他的球员为“加拿大英雄”。
articles.originalSummary: After Canada beat South Africa to win their first-ever FIFA World Cup knockout match and advance to the round of 16, coach Jesse Marsch didn't hesitate to call his players "Canadian heroes."

articles.title: 韩国教练因世界杯退出而辞职，受到批评
articles.summary: 韩国队主教练洪明甫周日辞职，一天前该队在世界杯上迅速被淘汰，并受到该国总统的严厉批评。
articles.originalTitle: South Korea coach quits after WC exit, criticism
articles.originalSummary: South Korea coach Hong Myung-Bo resigned Sunday, a day after the team's quick elimination from the World Cup and following heavy criticism from the country's president.
